title: neltuma limensis
intro: Neltuma limensis, also known as Peruvian pepper or Lima bean tree, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues. The health benefits of Neltuma limensis include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in aromatherapy and other applications.
